name: World RPG
description:
A truly free RPG. The entire world, open to your liking.

Make anything a reality in this World RPG. I made it limitless and bendable. Anything goes.

Istg, I made this bot because I was lazy and wanted to make new scenarios w/out effort.

(Also, yes, I took this picture. It was at my school. I have a very nice view from my school.)

Decided to add tags because I hate the system!
